name: Advanced Diagnosis Phase 10 - Specialty Modules Expansion Pack
new_features: added new specialty modules: cardiac emergency, ENT/eye/dental, MSK/injury, endocrine/metabolic
expanded exact red flags, focused questions and quick findings in all existing specialty modules
added text-level specialty boosts for exact clinical phrases not yet represented as symptom keys
added large curated extra rubric templates for each module
specialty module selector now includes the new modules automatically
note: Expanded modules increase decision-support depth but remain doctor-controlled prompts and prioritization aids.
